query:
SELECT contract_no, commission_net, finance_amount,
  JSON_KEYS(raw_json) AS json_keys
FROM contracts
WHERE commission_net IS NOT NULL AND commission_net > 0
  AND section = 'Boonphone'
LIMIT 3;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway05.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3zL6E4esQEHiYzS.root --database WPSwtnWiTSyEVhTdqqAYk7 --execute
